news.title: News
news.metaDesc: Company news, industry updates, and events from NEX Power.

n1.title: New production line ramps up annual capacity
n1.excerpt: Key processes expanded to improve delivery performance.
n1.content: Hebi Nuoxin Electronics announced the commissioning of a new line focused on UAV power pack assembly and testing, introducing automated inspection to improve consistency and shorten lead times. The company will continue investing in R&D and quality systems.

n2.title: Updated battery safety guidance — what changed
n2.excerpt: New requirements for labeling, storage, and handling.
n2.content: Recent industry guidance updates address marking, packaging, and emergency handling. We recommend evaluating thermal-runaway mitigation and maintenance policies early in design. NEX Power can provide test data and compliance guidance.

n3.title: NEX Power at Shenzhen UAV Expo 2026
n3.excerpt: Industry packs for agriculture, surveying, and inspection on display.
n3.content: Visit our booth to see sample packs and discuss joint development programs with airframe partners.

n4.title: Recognized as a quality excellence enterprise
n4.excerpt: Continuous improvement in the quality management system.
n4.content: The award reflects customer and institutional recognition of our process control and continuous improvement.

n5.title: UAV market outlook 2026
n5.excerpt: Application depth drives diversified power needs.
n5.content: Agriculture and inspection remain strong; logistics pilots increase demand for fast charge and operational data capabilities. Battery vendors must balance safety, cost, and delivery.

tech.title: Technical support
tech.metaDesc: Articles on Li-ion, BMS, and UAV applications.

t1.title: Cell balancing strategies
t1.content: Long-term pack uniformity depends on balancing strategy and usage. Passive balancing is cost-effective but wastes energy; active balancing is efficient but more complex. UAV missions should choose based on mission profile and cycle-life goals, together with BMS accuracy and harness drops.

t2.title: Capacity and impedance in cold environments
t2.excerpt: How low temperatures affect performance and safety margins.
t2.content: Ion mobility slows in the cold, reducing usable capacity and increasing impedance. Mission planning should include power margins and avoid cold fast charging. Insulation or preheat may be required.

t3.title: Fast charging vs safety margins
t3.content: Fast charging accelerates aging and heat accumulation. Use stepped currents, temperature monitoring, and conservative cutoffs in the BMS.

t4.title: UAV power budgeting basics
t4.excerpt: From takeoff weight to endurance — a rough method.
t4.content: Estimate hover and cruise power, then select cells and series/parallel topology using available energy and C-rate. Weight and structure strongly affect real endurance — iterate with tests.

about.title: About us

hero.title: Focused on UAV batteries and energy delivery
hero.subtitle: Engineering capabilities for airframers and industry customers

intro.title: Company profile
intro.body: Hebi NEX Power Electronics Co., Ltd. is located at No.131 Haihe Road, Hebi Economic and Technological Development Zone, covering 100 acres. The company has introduced advanced automated and semi-automated production equipment and precision testing instruments, with a modern R&D laboratory and production base. It is one of China's leading battery manufacturers using the automated stacking process. NEX Power focuses on high-rate polymer lithium batteries, integrating R&D, production, sales, and service. Products are widely used in professional drones, car emergency power, aerial photography, remote control models, robots, plant protection machines, and military portable electronic devices. Since its establishment, NEX Power has been committed to providing safe and high-quality battery solutions in modeling, power tools, military equipment, solar and wind energy storage, and national grid applications.
